response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical breadth and depth across multiple languages, systems, and domains, with notable experience in high-performance, distributed systems (e.g., low-latency microservices at Dunnhumby). However, his resume lacks direct evidence of experimentation systems, A/B testing frameworks, or growth platform development, which are core to this role. His recent work leans toward AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, which are adjacent but not fully aligned with the experimentation/measurement focus.
strengths: Deep expertise in distributed systems and low-latency architectures (e.g., handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby)
Strong engineering fundamentals with proven ability to deliver scalable, maintainable systems (e.g., Geo-Data platform, AI-agent infrastructure)
Hands-on technical leadership and mentorship, including organizing workshops and advocating for best practices like TDD and CI/CD
concerns: No explicit experience with experimentation frameworks, feature flagging, or A/B testing systems, which are central to this role
Limited evidence of building unified growth measurement or cross-surface experimentation platforms
Recent roles focus more on AI-agent tooling and developer infrastructure rather than growth/experimentation systems
